01 — ABOUT

The Story Behind the Code

Get to know me — my journey, my passion, and what drives me to build.

Education

Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)

Hindusthan College of Science and Commerce

Graduation

2026

CGPA

7.34

Location

Erode, Tamil Nadu, India

Problem SolverQuick LearnerClean CodeAI Enthusiast

Python Developer

I build efficient applications and automation scripts using Python. From Flask web apps to AI integrations with OpenAI and Anthropic APIs, Python is my go-to language for solving problems.

Web Developer

I create responsive, modern web applications using React, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript. I focus on clean UI, smooth interactions, and accessible design that works across all devices.

Backend Developer

I design and build robust server-side systems using Flask, REST APIs, SQL databases, and authentication flows. I prioritize security, scalability, and clean architecture.

💡Fun fact: I love turning complex problems into elegant backend solutions. My motto — "if it works, make it better."

03 — PROJECTS

What I've Built

Projects that showcase my skills in backend development, AI integration, and web technologies.

Featured Project

AI Code Review System

Full-Stack AI Application

A production-ready web application that automates source code analysis using AI. Detects bugs, security vulnerabilities, and coding standard violations with intelligent fix suggestions.

2

AI Engines

15+

Bug Categories

Deep

Analysis Depth

OpenAI GPT + Anthropic Claude integration
Severity classification & quality scores
File upload & user authentication
Analysis history & fallback static analysis

ai-code-review

04 — JOURNEY

My Timeline

A chronological journey through my education, projects, and milestones.

2023

Started BCA

Began Bachelor of Computer Applications at Hindusthan College of Science and Commerce, Erode.

2023

Python Programming Diploma

Earned Advance Diploma in Python Programming from CSC, building a strong foundation in software development.

2024

Deep Dive into Web Development

Mastered React.js, Flask, REST APIs, and database management. Started building full-stack applications.

2025

AI Code Review System

Built a production-ready AI-powered code analysis platform integrating OpenAI GPT and Anthropic Claude APIs.

2026

Professional Certifications

Completed multiple job simulations with Tata, Deloitte, and Forage — specializing in GenAI and Data Analytics.

2026

BCA Graduation

Expected graduation with CGPA 7.34/10. Ready to contribute to innovative software teams.
